name: Green Tomato Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
Yield: About 7 quarts
Procedure:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Cook slowly, stirring often, until tender and slightly thickened (about 35 to 40 minutes).
3. Fill jars with hot mixture, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
4. Adjust lids and process as follows:
- Recommended process time for Green Tomato Pie Filling in a boiling-water canner:
- Style of Pack: Hot
- Jar Size: Quarts
- Process Time at Altitudes of 0 - 1,000 ft: 15 minutes
- Process Time at Altitudes of 1,001 - 6,000 ft: 20 minutes
- Process Time above 6,000 ft: 25 minutes
